diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -101,3 +101,84 @@
         out_in = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb, next_a_emb, next_ca_emb], dim=-1)

         logits = self.out(out_in).squeeze(-1)

         return logits

+

+class DKT_Target_Features_Ext(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.num_skills = num_skills

+        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

+        self.attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 64)

+        self.correct_attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 64)

+        self.recency_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)

+        

+        self.cont_proj = nn.Linear(5, 32)

+        

+        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2 + 128 + 32 + 32, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0)

+        

+        self.target_skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        

+        self.out = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim + 128 + 32 + 32, hidden_dim),

+            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)

+        )

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        

+    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency, 

+                next_skills, next_attempts, next_correct_attempts, next_total_corrects, next_recency):

+        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

+        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

+        

+        attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(attempts, 0, 4999)

+        correct_attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(correct_attempts, 0, 4999)

+        recency_emb_idx = torch.clamp(recency, 0, 4999)

+        

+        a_emb = self.attempt_emb(attempts_emb_idx)

+        ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(correct_attempts_emb_idx)

+        r_emb = self.recency_emb(recency_emb_idx)

+        

+        B, T = skill_ids.shape

+        device = skill_ids.device

+        total_attempts = torch.arange(T, device=device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T).float()

+        

+        cont_feats = torch.stack([

+            attempts.float() / 100.0,

+            correct_attempts.float() / 100.0,

+            total_attempts / 1000.0,

+            total_corrects.float() / 1000.0,

+            recency.float() / 100.0

+        ], dim=-1)

+        cont_emb = torch.relu(self.cont_proj(cont_feats))

+        

+        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb, a_emb, ca_emb, r_emb, cont_emb], dim=-1)

+        x = self.dropout(x)

+        

+        h, _ = self.gru(x)

+        h = self.dropout(h)

+        

+        next_s_emb = self.target_skill_emb(next_skills)

+        

+        next_attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(next_attempts, 0, 4999)

+        next_correct_attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(next_correct_attempts, 0, 4999)

+        next_recency_emb_idx = torch.clamp(next_recency, 0, 4999)

+        

+        next_a_emb = self.attempt_emb(next_attempts_emb_idx)

+        next_ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(next_correct_attempts_emb_idx)

+        next_r_emb = self.recency_emb(next_recency_emb_idx)

+        

+        next_total_attempts = torch.arange(1, T+1, device=device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T).float()

+        next_cont_feats = torch.stack([

+            next_attempts.float() / 100.0,

+            next_correct_attempts.float() / 100.0,

+            next_total_attempts / 1000.0,

+            next_total_corrects.float() / 1000.0,

+            next_recency.float() / 100.0

+        ], dim=-1)

+        next_cont_emb = torch.relu(self.cont_proj(next_cont_feats))

+        

+        out_in = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb, next_a_emb, next_ca_emb, next_r_emb, next_cont_emb], dim=-1)

+        logits = self.out(out_in).squeeze(-1)

+        return logits

@@ -31,6 +31,53 @@
         

     return attempts, correct_attempts

 

+def precompute_features_ext(skills, corrects, num_skills):

+    B, T = skills.shape

+    attempts = torch.zeros_like(skills)

+    correct_attempts = torch.zeros_like(skills)

+    total_corrects = torch.zeros_like(skills)

+    recency = torch.zeros_like(skills)

+    

+    device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

+    

+    chunk_size = 256

+    for i in range(0, B, chunk_size):

+        s_chunk = skills[i:i+chunk_size].to(device)

+        c_chunk = corrects[i:i+chunk_size].to(device)

+        

+        one_hot_skills = torch.nn.functional.one_hot(s_chunk, num_classes=num_skills)

+        one_hot_corrects = one_hot_skills * c_chunk.unsqueeze(-1)

+        

+        cum_attempts = torch.cumsum(one_hot_skills, dim=1)

+        cum_corrects = torch.cumsum(one_hot_corrects, dim=1)

+        

+        cum_attempts = torch.cat([torch.zeros(s_chunk.shape[0], 1, num_skills, dtype=torch.long, device=device), cum_attempts[:, :-1, :]], dim=1)

+        cum_corrects = torch.cat([torch.zeros(s_chunk.shape[0], 1, num_skills, dtype=torch.long, device=device), cum_corrects[:, :-1, :]], dim=1)

+        

+        attempts_chunk = torch.gather(cum_attempts, 2, s_chunk.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)

+        correct_attempts_chunk = torch.gather(cum_corrects, 2, s_chunk.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)

+        

+        attempts[i:i+chunk_size] = attempts_chunk.cpu()

+        correct_attempts[i:i+chunk_size] = correct_attempts_chunk.cpu()

+        

+        cum_total_corrects = torch.cumsum(c_chunk, dim=1)

+        cum_total_corrects = torch.cat([torch.zeros(s_chunk.shape[0], 1, dtype=torch.long, device=device), cum_total_corrects[:, :-1]], dim=1)

+        total_corrects[i:i+chunk_size] = cum_total_corrects.cpu()

+        

+        last_attempt_step = torch.zeros(s_chunk.shape[0], num_skills, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

+        recency_chunk = torch.zeros_like(s_chunk)

+        for t in range(T):

+            s_t = s_chunk[:, t]

+            last_step = torch.gather(last_attempt_step, 1, s_t.unsqueeze(1)).squeeze(1)

+            is_first = (attempts_chunk[:, t] == 0)

+            rec = torch.where(is_first, torch.zeros_like(last_step), t - last_step)

+            recency_chunk[:, t] = rec

+            last_attempt_step.scatter_(1, s_t.unsqueeze(1), t)

+            

+        recency[i:i+chunk_size] = recency_chunk.cpu()

+        

+    return attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency

+

 def main():

     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

     parser.add_argument('--data_path', type=str, required=True)

@@ -55,6 +102,8 @@
     

     if model_type == 'DKT_Target_Features':

     if model_type == 'DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut':

         model = DKT_Target_Features(num_skills, embed_dim=embed_dim, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, dropout=dropout).to(device)

+    elif model_type == 'DKT_Target_Features_Ext':

                 preds = torch.sigmoid(logits)[mask]

+            elif model_type == 'DKT_Target_Features_Ext':

+                b_attempts = attempts[i:i+batch_size].to(device)

+                preds = torch.sigmoid(logits)[mask]

                 

             all_preds.extend(preds.cpu().numpy().tolist())
